[2018-04-26 14:32] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): is antima + blood pact good? when i noticed the combo i thought i lost, but didn't turn out that way
[2018-04-26 14:33] p0lari (Polari): how is that a combo?
[2018-04-26 14:33] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): protect your engineers at little gold cost
[2018-04-26 14:34] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): wait it's just a wash if they hold grimbotch right >_>
[2018-04-26 14:34] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): also how do you decide between odin and lucina? odin gives bigger threat immediately but is a little slower
[2018-04-26 14:35] p0lari (Polari): so it's like engi+forcefield except instead of losing a drone the opponent gets the botch
[2018-04-26 14:35] p0lari (Polari): uh odin and lucina play quite different
[2018-04-26 14:35] p0lari (Polari): if it's a question of rushing out one or the other the answer is you get odin and if the opponent gets lucy you blow them up
[2018-04-26 14:36] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): if it's lucina rush vs odin rush, doesn't lucina come out first and stop odin from coming out?
[2018-04-26 14:36] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): or is it easy enough for odin to hold off one turn of lucina and then blow up lucina the next turn
[2018-04-26 14:37] p0lari (Polari): typically when you ramp up to odin you first get one forge and then two more
[2018-04-26 14:37] p0lari (Polari): if lucy hits the board half a turn earlier you absorb 2 and lose 2 engis
[2018-04-26 14:37] p0lari (Polari): then you play odin and find yourself in a situation where both players are doing similar damage but one is defending with blue and one with red
[2018-04-26 14:38] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): yeah that makes sense.
[2018-04-26 14:38] p0lari (Polari): I actually had a lucy vs odin game recently, let's see if I can find it quick
[2018-04-26 14:41] p0lari (Polari): lol I forgot lucy didn't even get more than one click because he turned all his drones into vivids
[2018-04-26 14:41] p0lari (Polari): should still look roughly the same overall
[2018-04-26 14:42] p0lari (Polari): lucy player absorbs for one and soaks with rhinos and perfs
[2018-04-26 14:42] p0lari (Polari): odin player absorbs with wall and soaks with walls
[2018-04-26 14:44] p0lari (Polari): of course this is only for rushing them out, if you're getting them later after a big absorber and just want an attacker, lucy is just way better
[2018-04-26 14:50] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): good illustration of the 2 rushes tho
[2018-04-26 14:50] vanitascabal6962 (VanitasCabal): with bull (or, say, polywall) in the set, is there any chance of bull transition into lucy being better than rushing odin?
[2018-04-26 14:52] p0lari (Polari): odin's biggest strengths are the huge pressure out of nowhere, and being a 4hp absorber
[2018-04-26 14:52] p0lari (Polari): if there's other strong defence in the set he's not that impressive
[2018-04-26 14:53] p0lari (Polari): imagine rushing out odin into a matrix

[2018-04-28 01:55] amalloy: @itsotter i think your shredder use was fine there and you lost for other reasons. you were half a turn ahead on omegas, but behind in attack the whole game, which made you spend a bunch more on engis than your opponent did
[2018-04-28 01:56] amalloy: your reduced damage output meant your opponent could afford to attack with shredders without offering a breach, which helped him get further ahead
[2018-04-28 01:56] itsotter: i am looking at the line where i drone up and get omegas the half-turn after him
[2018-04-28 01:56] itsotter: i think this is actually bad too but it's probably closer
[2018-04-28 01:57] amalloy: your opponent was also making use of his conduit to get more tempo, while your green was just floating
[2018-04-28 01:58] itsotter: is there an understood better omega timing for p1 or p2?
[2018-04-28 02:00] itsotter: going to 3 blastforge on my turn 5 was too early, but he seems happy to do it on his turn 6, which makes me think i should have pursued something asymmetric somehow
